topic: Preparing for a Client Session With Prime Self
learningGoal: Practitioners can turn a chart and synthesis into a focused, humane session-prep workflow.
keyPoints: Review the client's Blueprint before the session so you can enter with orientation instead of improvising from scratch
Identify two or three themes to explore rather than trying to explain the whole chart in one sitting
Use the AI Synthesis as a prompt layer, then apply your own discernment and client context
End your prep with one intended outcome for the session so the conversation stays grounded
toneNotes: Competent, calm, and practitioner-respectful. Reinforce discernment and scope.
